reviews.review_description: Had this game on my ps4 just like I remembered

reviews.review_title: Basic Minigames at a Basic Price
reviews.review_description: The game delivers exactly what it promises for a $5 game reboot: a series of very simple minigames that span 15 "days", after which they repeat in a random order with a huge difficulty spike. The game does get quite challenging, but after playing a half hour I'm not convinced I want to master it.

reviews.review_title: Short enough to stay engaging every time
reviews.review_description: Decent variety of mini games, something you could easily play for 5-10 minutes a day and not get bored of too easily. Very solid experience for the price point, 5/5 must buy

A great game! Simple concept…survive the Viking training mini games that that get harder and harder the further you get into it. There are 10 mini games (inc. axe throwing, beer drinking, climbing) that last around 10-30 seconds each and randomly select. The music, design and general theming is fun slick. VR Monkey have done a great job with this game. For a better review and gameplay checkout my video

https://youtu.be/vDsLMWGFNfY

reviews.review_title: Do you have what it takes to be a Viking
reviews.review_description:
Viking Days Remaster is built up of over 15 mini Viking challenges, to prove yourself a true Viking.

The game has a rouge like element to it. Ever time you fail a challenge, you start over on day one. The game mixes up the challenges every time, so you never know what event you are stepping into.

The mini games will really test your skills. You will do things from rhythm drum playing, skiing, ax tossing, outrun a giant and much more. You will be tested in all areas of Viking skills.

The game has a nice Viking world with great music to immerse you into the game. I felt like I was in a Viking time.

If you love mini games, that cover a variety of skills, this game is it. Viking Days is a fun challenging game, that keeps you coming back for more.

Check out my preview here:
https://youtu.be/5nHBbgVJ8OM
A fun collection of mini games that is great for parties or to introduce people to VR.

This game is 100 percent worth the few bucks you spend. I absolutely love the art style and gameplay features. The game is about 10 different mini games that get harder as you go, which is a breath of fresh air! 💙

reviews.review_title: Loads of fun! A real Viking treat!
reviews.review_description:
You can see my video review with loads of gameplay here: https://youtu.be/sbMBlITojjg

The challenges in Viking Days have lots of variety both in terms of content and how they make you move your body, and it's all about VIKINGS which always wins extra points :D
You can watch my review at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zXUKjAn5Q2o
This game is amazing, at first you think it's pretty easy but the difficulty increases after each day and it becomes really hard!!! It's so much fun, i loved it and absolutely recommend it

reviews.review_title: I BECAME A VIKING!! AND I LOVED IT! 🗡
reviews.review_description:
Now….. the gameplay is great and I really enjoyed the mini games on this they were really fun and addictive. Why I gave four stars?……. I want more, I wanted the levels to be longer and to have more variation because IT IS addictive. Now having said that, when you play more days the levels get harder and longer, that is the plus. But i just want it to have more. Put some puzzles in their to figure out, viking beer pong maybe, ship rowing 🚣‍♀️, dragon spearing, dragon flying, sword fighting 🤺, even a fort/tower defence mode. There is a lot this game could have and should have for its full release which will keep people playing. 

This is one of those games you get out whilst your having people round to get everyone involved and compete against each other. This definitely falls into this category. 

VR Monkey have a great dev team and I know they will commit and make this better again for sure! Great job so far and I will re-visit this game on the next patch/update that is for sure!! 💯💯💯💯💯💯

Check out the video I did to know more over on YouTube:

REALITY ON VR
This game was an absolute blast, tho i wasnt very good at it 😂😂, but witb that i also dont want my skill to reflect a bad review, bc this game has alot of potential and is a great party game!!!

reviews.review_title: Fun mini games you can hop into anytime
reviews.review_description:
Viking Days is a series of mini games to see how long you can survive as a Viking. While each of the mini games are fairly short, they're also very fun. This is a quaint game that you can just hop into and have some good fun trying to see how many days you can last. Def a recommend from me.  Here's a link to a video I did on it.



https://youtu.be/gTJ1iiZ40So
It's very easy to learn and hard to survive. I love fast-paced minigames!
I really like the way the days get difficult over time and keeps the challenge going up! Makes me feel like a true viking

reviews.review_title: Quick pick up and play fun!
reviews.review_description: Viking days is a compilation of Viking mini games. Great casual fun for VR noobs and Pros, also great for parties and games nights. 👍🏾
